nodes.label: AI as logistics coordinator for complex creative projects
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to use an AI assistant to go through the names and place them in different areas of a large palace ballroom and social scene

nodes.label: AI as creative spark through hallucinated errors
nodes.label_negative: AI hallucination as pure error without value
nodes.grounding_span: the AI will begin to hallucinate characters who don't exist. Some of these characters and names, however, have been interesting enough that I did build them out

nodes.label: AI as barrier-remover for executive function challenges
nodes.label_negative: Executive function barriers without AI assistance
nodes.grounding_span: I have ADHD and I'm awful at logistics... Having an easy workaround for that is really helpful

nodes.label: AI as threat to skill development in young writers
nodes.label_negative: AI as beneficial learning tool for young writers
nodes.grounding_span: I'm worried about the kids... I would have been losing really valuable time exercising that mental muscle

nodes.label: AI-generated fiction as 'uncanny valley' lacking human value
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated fiction as valuable creative output
nodes.grounding_span: I truly feel like I never used to have to shuffle through so much empty-feeling fiction... It's like the uncanny valley for writing

nodes.label: AI as environmental burden due to water consumption
nodes.grounding_span: I would definitely use it more if I could be assured the models I was using weren't guzzling gallons and gallons of water

nodes.label: AI as professional tone translator for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I put what I want to say in normal person language, and the AI gives me back the professional email

nodes.label: Creative enjoyment and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy writing and generating the basics takes the fun out of it for me

nodes.label: Productivity and overcoming procrastination
nodes.grounding_span: I find it much easier to get over my procrastination instincts and start the scene

nodes.label: Skill development and cognitive growth
nodes.grounding_span: I would have been losing really valuable time exercising that mental muscle

nodes.label: Environmental sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: I do feel the guilt behind that weighing on me

nodes.label: Professional competence and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: Expanding on that area of assistance... would be amazing for me

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI for logistics coordination
nodes.grounding_span: There is no way I could have pulled off the true randomness of the interactions and character groupings without such a tool

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI hallucination as creative spark
nodes.grounding_span: Some of these characters and names, however, have been interesting enough that I did build them out

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI for executive function support
nodes.grounding_span: Having an easy workaround for that is really helpful, especially on days when I can't take my medication

nodes.label: Negative concern about AI hindering skill development in youth
nodes.grounding_span: I'm worried about the kids... I would have been losing really valuable time exercising that mental muscle

nodes.label: Negative aversion to AI-generated fiction as low quality
nodes.grounding_span: I truly feel like I never used to have to shuffle through so much empty-feeling fiction before I got to something good

nodes.label: Negative guilt about environmental impact of AI
nodes.grounding_span: I do feel the guilt behind that weighing on me

nodes.label: Positive anticipation of AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Expanding on that area of assistance... would be amazing for me

nodes.label: Intuitive pattern recognition — sensing 'offness' without explicit rules
nodes.grounding_span: I could tell you immediately when something was wrong, but I usually had to look up the rule in order to be able to explain why

nodes.label: Strategic compartmentalization — preserving creative core while delegating logistics
nodes.grounding_span: Rarely, if ever, do I use AI in the creative process itself - I enjoy writing and generating the basics takes the fun out of it for me
